Initializing the Friends Library

Before calling any of the functions that manage friends requests, removals, or game invitations, the title must create an asynchronous online task for the friends library using the XOnlineFriendsStartup function. Calling XOnlineTaskContinue with this task causes work to be performed for the request and invitation functions. This task does not complete on its own. The title should continue to call XOnlineTaskContinue with this task (typically once per frame) until either the title no longer needs friends functionality, or until XOnlineTaskContinue returns an error code indicating that an error has occurred with this task. If the title does not call XOnlineTaskContinue frequently enough, the XOnlineFriends functions might return the XONLINE_E_NOTIFICATION_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS error code.

Note    The XOnlineFriendsGetAcceptedGameInvite function does not depend on the task created by XOnlineFriendsStartup. Therefore, your title can call it before invoking XOnlineFriendsStartup.
